steps.title: Identify the constant term
steps.content: In $f(x)=6x+9$, the number $6$ is the yearly growth rate, and $9$ is the starting value.

steps.title: Use the starting time
steps.content:
The phrase years after its height was first recorded means the first recording happens when $x=0$.
$$f(0)=6(0)+9=9$$
So $9$ is the estimated height, in feet, when the tree was first recorded. The answer is D.
